quoteLast: , the _Superb_ commenced to fire on the enemy’s van. At twenty past ten, the _Northumberland_ and _Spencer_ began firing. At half-past, we opened our fire on the first ship in the enemy’s line, at that time engaged by the _Spencer_, passing close across her bows, with one broadside brought her masts by the board. Stood on towards the three-decker, firing occasionally at her and two other of the enemy’s ships, as we could get our guns to bear. All the squadron in action.
